parsed_output.justification: The transcript shows that several players complain that Mitchell has repeatedly claimed not to be a werewolf even after being accused by several others. His denial and the lack of any consistent evidence of a final role swap suggest he may have been the target as a werewolf. Additionally, multiple exchanges mentioned involve Mitchell being robbed from or vice‑versa, hinting that his card was likely changed during the night. Based on this pattern, it seems most reasonable to believe Mitchell was the werewolf.
